members.name: GetCcdikJointBone2dNode
members.summary: Returns the [Bone2D] node assigned to the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: GetCcdikJointBoneIndex
members.summary: Returns the index of the [Bone2D] node assigned to the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: GetCcdikJointConstraintAngleInvert
members.summary: Returns whether the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx] uses an inverted joint constraint. See [method set_ccdik_joint_constraint_angle_invert] for details.

members.name: GetCcdikJointConstraintAngleMax
members.summary: Returns the maximum angle constraint for the joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: GetCcdikJointConstraintAngleMin
members.summary: Returns the minimum angle constraint for the joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: GetCcdikJointEnableConstraint
members.summary: Returns whether angle constraints on the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx] are enabled.

members.name: GetCcdikJointRotateFromJoint
members.summary: Returns whether the joint at [param joint_idx] is set to rotate from the joint, [code]true[/code], or to rotate from the tip, [code]false[/code]. The default is to rotate from the tip.

members.name: SetCcdikJointBone2dNode
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointBone2dNode(int jointIdx, NodePath bone2dNodepath)
members.summary: Sets the [Bone2D] node assigned to the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: SetCcdikJointBoneIndex
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointBoneIndex(int jointIdx, int boneIdx)
members.summary: Sets the bone index, [param bone_idx], of the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx]. When possible, this will also update the [code]bone2d_node[/code] of the CCDIK joint based on data provided by the linked skeleton.

members.name: SetCcdikJointConstraintAngleInvert
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointConstraintAngleInvert(int jointIdx, bool invert)
members.summary: Sets whether the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx] uses an inverted joint constraint. An inverted joint constraint only constraints the CCDIK joint to the angles [i]outside of[/i] the inputted minimum and maximum angles. For this reason, it is referred to as an inverted joint constraint, as it constraints the joint to the outside of the inputted values.

members.name: SetCcdikJointConstraintAngleMax
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointConstraintAngleMax(int jointIdx, float angleMax)
members.summary: Sets the maximum angle constraint for the joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: SetCcdikJointConstraintAngleMin
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointConstraintAngleMin(int jointIdx, float angleMin)
members.summary: Sets the minimum angle constraint for the joint at [param joint_idx].

members.name: SetCcdikJointEnableConstraint
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointEnableConstraint(int jointIdx, bool enableConstraint)
members.summary: Determines whether angle constraints on the CCDIK joint at [param joint_idx] are enabled. When [code]true[/code], constraints will be enabled and taken into account when solving.

members.name: SetCcdikJointRotateFromJoint
members.signature: public void SetCcdikJointRotateFromJoint(int jointIdx, bool rotateFromJoint)
members.summary: Sets whether the joint at [param joint_idx] is set to rotate from the joint, [code]true[/code], or to rotate from the tip, [code]false[/code].

members.name: CcdikDataChainLength
members.summary: The number of CCDIK joints in the CCDIK modification.

members.name: TargetNodepath
members.summary: The NodePath to the node that is the target for the CCDIK modification. This node is what the CCDIK chain will attempt to rotate the bone chain to.

members.name: TipNodepath
members.summary: The end position of the CCDIK chain. Typically, this should be a child of a [Bone2D] node attached to the final [Bone2D] in the CCDIK chain.
